title: Minimax Code + M3 : Crazy Alternative to Claude,Codex!
summary: MiniMax M3 is an open-weights AI model focused on coding agents and long-context workflows, supporting up to 1 million token context windows. It is compatible with both Anthropic and OpenAI API endpoints and natively supports multimodal inputs including images and video.
writeup: The video covers MiniMax M3, an open-weights model built for coding agents and long-context workflows, positioned as an alternative to Claude and Codex. It matters because the model is API-compatible with both Anthropic and OpenAI endpoints, which lowers the cost of swapping it into existing setups. Key takeaways: M3 supports context windows up to 1 million tokens, natively handles multimodal inputs including images and video, and ships with open weights.
